recipe.title: High-Protein Chicken Caesar Wrap
recipe.summary: A quick chicken Caesar wrap with crisp romaine, Parmesan, and more than 40 grams of protein for under 400 calories.
instructions: Place the tortilla on a clean cutting board.
Toss the chicken and romaine with the light Caesar dressing.
Spoon the chicken mixture down the center of the tortilla.
Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and black pepper.
Fold in the sides, roll the tortilla tightly, and slice the wrap in half.
tips: Use precooked grilled chicken to keep preparation under 10 minutes.
Pat the romaine dry so the wrap does not become soggy.
Wrap it tightly in parchment paper for an easy packed lunch.

seo.meta_description: Make this easy chicken Caesar wrap with 52g protein, approximately 380 calories, and simple ingredients in eight minutes.

images.image_prompt: A realistic sliced chicken Caesar wrap filled with grilled chicken, chopped romaine, light Caesar dressing, grated Parmesan, and black pepper.
images.alt_text: High-protein chicken Caesar wrap sliced in half with chicken, romaine, Parmesan, and light Caesar dressing.

pinterest.title: Chicken Caesar Wrap | 52g Protein | 380 Calories
pinterest.description: This high-protein chicken Caesar wrap is crisp, satisfying, ready in eight minutes, and packed with 52 grams of protein for approximately 380 calories.
